response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates 13+ years of full-stack experience with a strong focus on Node.js, TypeScript, React, and MongoDB, closely matching the primary stack. His roles at re:cinq and Optilyz show direct relevance to the role's responsibilities, including AI-agent infrastructure, scalable systems, and user-focused solutions. His open-source contributions and leadership in testing frameworks further validate his technical depth and collaboration skills.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with direct match to primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB)
Proven track record in scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and user-oriented solutions
Strong testing and CI/CD expertise with leadership in developer tooling and open-source contributions
concerns: Limited explicit experience with Nest.js (though Node.js/TypeScript expertise suggests adaptability)
No direct mention of Vitest (though Jest/Vitest are similar testing frameworks)
Primary focus on Node.js/TypeScript may require adjustment for Kotlin/Java secondary stack

key_factors.factor: Direct full-stack experience with primary stack
Proven scalable systems and AI-agent work
